Van Life Seat Solutions

Why Choose RVSE

Built for the Road.
Engineered to Last.

We design and manufacture RV seating systems that convert effortlessly, fit precisely, and meet the highest safety standards in the US and European markets.

01
One-Click Conversion

Our patent-pending mechanism transforms any seat into a flat sleeping surface in under 10 seconds — no tools, no hassle. Perfect for overnight van life stops.

02
EU & US Certified

ISO9001, CCC, and CE certified. All seats meet ECE R016-0085-01 HANZA (US) and ECE R17/R80 (EU) safety standards. Export documentation included with every order.

03
Full Customization

Choose your dimensions, fabric, color, armrest style, and mounting configuration. We support OEM/ODM orders from 50 units with your branding and specifications.

04
Space-Saving Design

Engineered for compact van interiors. Our seats maximize sleeping space while maintaining full seat functionality — no wasted square footage in your build.

05
Universal Fitment

Compatible with Ford Transit, Mercedes Sprinter, Ram ProMaster, VW Crafter, Iveco Daily, and 40+ other popular van and RV platforms across US and EU markets.

06
B2B / Wholesale Ready

Dedicated wholesale pricing tiers, NET 30 terms for qualified dealers, drop-ship options, and white-label programs for European and North American distributors.

Customization Service

Your Build.
Your Specs.

From single-unit custom orders to full OEM production runs — RVSE handles every dimension, fabric, and functional requirement your project demands.

01
Tell Us Your Van & Requirements

Share your van model, interior dimensions, seating layout, and how you use the space — daily driving, weekends, or full-time living. We support 40+ van platforms.

02
Choose Fabric, Foam & Function

Select from 47 upholstery options (vinyl, leather, technical outdoor fabric), foam density (standard / high-density / cool-gel), armrest styles, and conversion mechanism type.

03
Review CAD Drawing & Sample

We provide a free CAD drawing within 48 hours. Physical samples available before production start. Lead time: 15–25 days for custom orders, 5–7 days for stock items.

04
Production, QC & Worldwide Shipping

ISO9001-controlled production. 100% QC inspection before shipment. We ship DDP/FOB/CIF to US, EU, AU with full export documentation and certifications included.

Custom Order Inquiry

Get a quote within 24 hours — wholesale or single unit.

Quality & Compliance

Certified for
Every Market.

Every RVSE product ships with full documentation for US and European import. Our certifications ensure smooth customs clearance and dealer-level compliance.

ISO9001
Quality Management System — full manufacturing process certification since 2010
CE Mark
European Conformity — mandatory for EU market. Covers ECE R016-0085-01 HANZA seat safety standards
CCC
China Compulsory Certification — ensures domestic production quality. Supports international export compliance
Patents
8 registered patents covering our convertible mechanism, mounting system, and ergonomic backrest design

About RVSE

Professional RV
Seat Engineering

Founded in 2008, RVSE (RV Seat Engineering) is a specialized manufacturer of convertible seating systems for the recreational vehicle, camper van, and motorhome markets. Our factory in Guangdong operates under ISO9001 quality management with 15,000 sqm of production space.

We serve dealers, converters, and end users across North America, Western Europe, and Australia — with dedicated sales support in English, German, French, and Spanish.

✦ ISO9001:2015 certified factory with 100% final inspection before shipment
✦ CE, CCC, and ECE R016-0085-01 HANZA compliant seat safety testing on all models
✦ OEM/ODM capability from 50 units with full branding and custom spec
✦ DDP shipping to US, EU, AU — full customs documentation included
Contact Our Export Team →
